message:
chore(beads): file fd90.221 — expose Bayesian Runtime Policy inspection types (frankenpandas-a179t)

Add bead frankenpandas-a179t to the local beads JSONL. The bead describes a public-API gap: EvidenceLedger.records() returns &[DecisionRecord], whose public fields (mode/action/issue/metrics/evidence) reference seven types — RuntimeMode, DecisionAction, IssueKind, CompatibilityIssue, EvidenceTerm, DecisionMetrics, DecisionRecord — plus GalaxyBrainCard (decision_to_card return type) — that all live in fp_runtime but are not re-exported from the top-level frankenpandas crate. Downstream code therefore can't pattern-match on a DecisionRecord without depending on fp_runtime directly, which contradicts the README's "Bayesian Runtime Policy" section that documents the ledger as user-inspectable.

Scope (per bead): re-export those 8 items from frankenpandas::lib, add them to the prelude, and extend prelude_completeness_compile_guard. status=in_progress, priority=2 (medium), type=bug.

This commit only files the bead JSONL entry; no source/lib.rs changes here. The implementer will pick it up via `br ready`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
